---
title: "Blanche Oram"
---

## Blanche Oram

**Dates:** (1866-1930)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1891-7)

### Biography

She married (1897) Charles Winder;  she also published as ‘Roma White’ and Blanche Winder. [Blain, <i>Feminist Companion</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
